# Gyeon Q2M Wetcoat Wet Coat - 500ml/4L

Rated 4.8 out of 5 stars - 109 Reviews
96% would recommend this product

Price: $28.99 AUD (500ml) / $129.99 AUD (4L)
Tax included.

Images:
- https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/GyeonQ2MWetcoatWetCoat-500ml.jpg?v=1712557075
- https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/GyeonQ2MWetcoatWetCoat-4L.jpg?v=1712557075
- https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/products/DSawardwinner2022_c3b22311-9ac5-4bdf-8137-1cbb3ecc05cb.png?v=1712557075

## Description

Gyeon Q2M Wetcoat is a spray on-rinse off sealant that is designed to boost protection and gloss within minutes. It can be used over existing coatings or sealants to add more protection, or even applied to an uncoated surface to offer immediate protection.

The effect is nearly instantaneous, with the surfaces becoming extremely hydrophobic, beading water and glossy straight after rinsing. Gyeon Wetcoat offers amazing durability of up to 3 months for a product that can be applied in seconds due to the high SiO2 content. It also provides great protection with a contact angle of over 90 degrees, meaning water sheets and beads off very easily reducing the chance of water spotting.

Ideal as a quick-hit or a regular maintenance product to extend and enhance coatings or sealants, Wetcoat can be used over most surfaces like paint, trim, glass and wheels etc.

## How to Use

Ensure your car is washed and rinse well. Gyeon Q2M Wetcoat is already pre-mixed to ensure the correct & safe strength for paintwork, so shake the bottle well.

Spray Wetcoat onto all exterior surfaces evenly and thinly, using on average about 80-100ml to coat your car. Follow by rinsing off thoroughly with a high pressure cleaner to remove all residue - you will actually see it activate and bubble. (Gyeon recommends usage of a high pressure cleaner for this).

Once you have rinsed thoroughly, use your Mofo towel, Magic Micro or Bigboi Blowr for that streak free finish!

Always test in an inconspicuous spot for compatibility before using any product.

## Reviews Summary (AI Generated from 100 most recent reviews)

Customers say this coating product is remarkably easy to apply and rinse off, delivering instant results. Many reviews highlight the impressive water-beading effect and glossy finish. The spray-on application receives frequent praise for its simplicity, with users noting it works particularly well on wheels. While most find it provides excellent results, some mention it can streak if applied in sunny or warm conditions. Reviews indicate the coating lasts several weeks, with many becoming repeat purchasers. Common feedback addresses the need to use it sparingly, as a little goes a long way. Some users note limitations on glass surfaces, suggesting avoiding windshield application.

### Selected Reviews

- David G. (Verified Buyer, VIC, Age 45-54) - 4/5 stars - "Good stuff, easy to apply, nice gloss, just wish it lastde a bit longer :)"
- Zachary W. (Verified Buyer, QLD, Age 25-34) - 5/5 stars - "Fast delivery and great product makes the car look good every time"
- Adel S. (Verified Buyer, NSW, Age 45-54) - 5/5 stars - "This is very easy to use and it works very well"
- Arjun B. (Verified Buyer, NSW, Age 18-24) - 5/5 stars - "Water beads like crazzzzyyyy"
- Gary S. (Verified Buyer, QLD, Age 55-64) - 4/5 stars - "I have used this product for 2 years and still believe it is the best in its category. I will never be without WETCOAT in my detailing kit."

# Gyeon Q2M WetCoat

Price: $20.95 USD
In stock, ready to ship
SKU: Q2M WetCoat 500ml
Barcode: 8809432671305

Images:
- https://esotericcarcare.com/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Wetcoat_032923__69276.1701812339.1280.1280.jpg?v=1724875971
- https://esotericcarcare.com/cdn/shop/files/WET_COAT_APLICATION_500x500__27264.1701812339.1280.1280.jpg?v=1724875971

## Instant Spray-On Ceramic Protection with Extreme Hydrophobic Performance

Gyeon Q2M WetCoat is one of the fastest and easiest ways to apply durable ceramic-style protection to your vehicle. Designed for maximum efficiency, WetCoat creates a powerful hydrophobic layer simply by spraying onto a wet surface and rinsing off immediately.

### Why Q2M WetCoat Works

WetCoat uses a highly reactive SiO2-based formula engineered to bond instantly to exterior surfaces when activated by water. This allows it to deliver strong water repellency, gloss enhancement, and self-cleaning behavior without wiping or buffing.

- Spray-on, rinse-off ceramic sealant technology
- Creates extreme hydrophobic and self-cleaning properties
- Improves gloss and surface slickness instantly
- Safe on paint, wheels, glass, plastic, metal, vinyl, and PPF
- Perfect as a standalone sealant or ceramic coating booster

### Application Made Simple

After washing your vehicle, apply Q2M WetCoat while the surface is still wet. Lightly mist the product onto one panel at a time, then immediately rinse thoroughly with water or a pressure washer. The protection activates on contact and begins working instantly.

Important: Do not allow WetCoat to dry on the surface, and avoid use in direct sunlight. If high spots occur, they will naturally fade after several weeks with normal washing.

### Use on All Exterior Surfaces

One of WetCoat's greatest advantages is its versatility. It can be safely used on nearly every exterior surface of your vehicle, making it ideal for fast maintenance washes and hard-to-reach areas like wheels and trim.

### ESOTERIC + GYEON Authority

Esoteric was the original U.S. importer and exclusive distributor of Gyeon products beginning in 2015. We played a foundational role in introducing Gyeon to the North American market and have hands-on experience with every generation of Gyeon coatings and maintenance products.

Q2M WetCoat is used daily in our professional detailing studio and taught as part of our Elite Detailer Academy curriculum. Our long-term testing confirms it as one of the most effective spray-on protection products available for both professionals and enthusiasts.

### Fast Protection. No Wiping. Immediate Results.

## Application Instructions

Apply to a clean, wet surface after washing. Spray lightly onto one panel at a time and immediately rinse thoroughly. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface.

## Best Practices for Use

Avoid direct sunlight during application. Use only on cool surfaces. If residue dries, allow it to wear off naturally with normal washing.

## Ideal Use Cases

Perfect for fast maintenance washes, ceramic coating boosters, wheel protection, and hard-to-reach exterior areas.

## Description

Q2M WetCoat is an instant, brilliantly easy to use hydrophobicity booster. It's ready to use formula, giving outstanding results in a simple and quick spray on/rinse off process. Despite its ease of use, Q2M WetCoat provides great durability and chemical resistance.

### INSTANT SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES

Q2M WetCoat is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes - simply spray-on and rinse-off. The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

### POSSIBLE USE ON ALL SURFACES

Major benefit of Q2M WetCoat is its versatile character, allowing usage on almost every exterior surface of your vehicle. It will add great self-cleaning properties not only to the paintwork but also to plastic or metal trims, rims or windows.

## Customer Reviews (5 reviews, 100% 5-star)

- Marc: "Commande exacte, bon prix et livraison rapide!"
- Darryl: "Excellent gloss, easy application and fast delivery"
- Monkey Man: "Fast coating - The easiest way to give your vehicle a quick coating, lasts about a month in Ontario conditions."
- Ian B.: "The Gold Standard for 'Spray on, Rinse Off Coatings' - Gyeon Wet Coat is probably one of the best, if not THE best spray on rinse off coatings on the market. Wet coat provides remarkable hydrophobic properties and leaves a high gloss finish on the paint that lasts 2-3 months. It's cost effective, easy to apply, and perfect for any detailing application. Pair with a clay treatment, and regular mx washes for best results."
- Dwayne Scott: "It's an amazing product. I will recommend to other detailers."

## GYEON Q²M Wet Coat - Time Saving Hydrophobic Coating

GYEON Q²M WetCoat is a revolutionary spray sealant that offers instant durable protection in minutes - simply spray-on and rinse-off.

The real advantage is the huge hydrophobic and self-cleaning effect that is delivered immediately, together with an intense gloss and shine to painted surfaces.

For a product with such ease of application, which does not even require a simple wipe off, GYEON Q²M WetCoat remains surprisingly durable, keeping its full hydrophobic effect for even up to 12 weeks/12 pH-neutral washes, which outshines many natural waxes or spray sealants.

A major benefit of GYEON Q²M Wet Coat is its versatile character, allowing usage on almost every exterior surface of your vehicle. It will add great self-cleaning properties to not only the paintwork but also to plastic or metal trims, rims or windows. GYEON Q²M Wet Coat is a highly concentrated and ready to use formula, which does not require diluting or mixing with anything. The product comes in a handy bottle with a sprayer, so the only thing you need to do is wash your car, spray on and rinse with a pressure washer.

### Features & Benefits

- Easy application - spray on to a wet car for lasting shine & protection
- Adds hydrophobic protection, repelling water, dirt & grease
- Safe to use on paintwork, plastic trim, metal, wheels & glass
- Lasts up to 3 months
- Use in conjunction with GYEON Q²M BATHE+ for even longer lasting protection

### Technical Specification

- Durability: ~12 weeks
- SiO2 percentage: <5%
- Contact angle: >90°
- Coverage: 100ml / car

Available in 500ml, 1000ml (with sprayers) & 4 Litre Bottle (no sprayer)

Key Features:
- Maximum water repellency for brilliant shine and cleanliness
- Ultra-fast application without polishing or reworking
- Protects paint, glass, and rims for up to 12 weeks
- Safe for all exterior surfaces and existing coatings

## Gyeon WetCoat – Ultimate Protection & Shine in Seconds!

If you want to see quick shine and impressive water-repellent and self-cleaning properties on the exterior surfaces of your vehicle, there's nothing easier than using Q²M WetCoat. Just spray on and rinse off to apply this globally best-selling spray sealant to your car. No mixing or diluting is necessary; you don't even need to wipe afterward. The water-repellent effect lasts up to 12 weeks or 12 washes.

### The easiest way to seal your car

Q²M WetCoat was developed to achieve maximum water-repellent effect with simple application. It can be used as a standalone sealant or applied as a topping to an existing ceramic coating. In any case, it's an absolutely simple method to make your car's paint highly self-cleaning.

### Quick application, impressive results

Gyeon WetCoat is the perfect solution for anyone who wants to protect their vehicle with a hydrophobic layer in just a few minutes. This innovative spray sealant provides maximum beading effect, intense shine, and protects the paint from dirt, water, and environmental influences - without the need for extensive polishing or application.

### A product for almost all surfaces

A major advantage of Gyeon Q²M WetCoat is its versatility. You can use it on all exterior surfaces of your car. This way, you not only make your paint self-cleaning but also protect plastic parts, metal trims, rims, and windows.

### Why Gyeon WetCoat?

- Extreme water beading effect - water and dirt bead off effortlessly.
- Quick & easy application - spray on, rinse off, done!
- Long-lasting protection - preserves the paint for up to 12 weeks.
- Safe for all surfaces - paint, glass, rims, and plastic.
- Suitable for waxed & ceramic coated vehicles.

TIP: Rinse off Q²M WetCoat immediately. Do not wait for the product to dry or react - the reaction occurs while rinsing it off. Also, do not spread it with a glove or cloth, as it is unnecessary.

## Application Instructions

- Thoroughly wash and clean the vehicle
- Leave the vehicle wet, do not dry
- Spray part by part
- Do not let WetCoat dry
- Activate with a pressure washer or water jet
- Dry the vehicle - and the perfect protection is done!
- Do not apply in direct sunlight

## FAQ

Q: Can I use Gyeon WetCoat on any vehicle?
A: Yes! Gyeon WetCoat is suitable for all types of paint, rims, glass, and plastic. Existing sealants or waxes remain intact.

Q: How long does the protection from Gyeon WetCoat last?
A: The protective layer lasts up to 12 weeks, depending on weather conditions and vehicle usage.

Q: Do I need to work WetCoat in with a microfiber cloth?
A: No, the product activates with the water jet and does not require additional rubbing in.

## Technical Features

- SiO2 Content: < 5%
- Contact angle: > 90°
- Durability: up to 12 weeks
- Consumption: 80 ml / per vehicle

## Review

Marius M. (Verified purchase, 01.04.2025) - 5/5 stars:
"Bester Lackschutz und perlt super ab. Hatte noch nie so einen so guten Lackschutz. Wetcoat war ganz einfach aufzutragen und mein Lack fühlt sich jetzt super weich an. Wasser perlt tatsächlich ab, wie bei all den Videos im Internet"
